rows.label: tev001201_MSG0001
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! Hey! You heading off
somewhere? Mind if I tag along?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I keep hitting dead ends with my
Doll flight module project, and it's
making my brain start to hurt...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0003
rows.name:
I think a little BLADE work in the
great outdoors would be just the thing
to clear my head. So how about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Lin to your team.

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Lin's request for now.

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0004
rows.name: Thanks, [ST:playername ]! The fresh air will do me good![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, okay. I bet the mission's
a real toughie, huh? Well,
thanks for looking out for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0010
rows.name:
How's your Doll flight
module holding up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'd love to see how it performs in the
field... Mind taking me with you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Lin to your team.

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Lin's request for now.

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0012
rows.name: Awesome! I'm so excited![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Aww, all right. I guess I'll go make
dinner then. Come back if you get hungry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0018
rows.name:
I can't believe we're finally gonna
get the Lifepoint Core back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll do anything to make this work
out, so take me along, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0020
rows.name: Thanks, [ST:playername ]! You won't regret this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Aww, all right. Good luck out there, you
hear? Make sure you come back safe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey, you heading off again? I
was just thinking I could use
a little adventure myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Come on, take me with you, okay?
Please? I'll go anywhere you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0170
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0171
rows.name: Add Lin to your team.

rows.label: tev001201_JNK0180
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001201_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline Lin's request for now.

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0028
rows.name: Fantastic! Let's get this party started![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Fiiine. I'll just hang out at boring old home
then. But at least bring me back some fresh
ingredients to mess around with in the kitchen, okay?[ST:wait ]
